summary: Rep. Al Green was censured by the House on March 6, 2025, via H.Res.189 (224-198 vote). This is explicitly cited in the question's fine print as a qualifying resolution.
content: The House voted to censure Rep. Al Green (D-TX) on March 6, 2025, for disrupting President Trump's joint address to Congress. The vote was 224-198, with 10 Democrats joining all Republicans. This resolution (H.Res.189) is explicitly mentioned in the question's fine print as an example of a resolution that would count for YES resolution. The question asks about events before April 1, 2026, so this event clearly qualifies. The question is essentially already resolved YES.
